meaning: adj.不注意的,粗心的,不警惕的,易受骗的
examples: Tax can be a minefield for the unwary.
The stock market is full of traps for the unwary.
We can't get unwary just because nothing unusual has cropped up.
Each era has its own myths that mislead the unwary into harmful error.
Arbitrators were not amused, ruling that unwary consumers might confuse these sites with the trademark holders' own.
